title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.301 - Stolen license plate tabs, replacement at no cost, when, procedure, limitation
text:
301.301.  Stolen license plate tabs, replacement at no cost, when, procedure, limitation. — Any person replacing a stolen license plate tab may receive at no cost up to two sets of two license plate tabs per year when the application for the replacement tab is accompanied with a notarized affidavit verifying that such license plate tab or tabs were stolen.
(L. 1995 S.B. 374 § 4, A.L. 2005 H.B. 487 merged with S.B. 378, A.L. 2007 S.B. 384, A.L. 2013 H.B. 103)
